creator: dumbbell@FreeBSD.org
text:
About sparc64, I'm building lang/gcc6 on the target because the cross-compiler (sparc64-gcc) is 6.3.0 and it doesn't want libstdc++ from gcc 4.9. Unfortunately, I'm having some troubles: comparison of stage2 and stage3 fails. I'm now rebuilding the port with the `BOOTSTRAP` option.

About armv6, Mikaël Urankar could bootstrap Rust and Cargo. However, Cargo segfaults while verifying if Rust can self-host.
